title: Private message conversation ids are not scoped to participants
broken_control: Conversation is loaded by id without checking participantAId/participantBId against currentUserId
impact: Read private messages, inject messages into another conversation, mark messages read, and tamper with deletion state

title: Article feed renders author-controlled titles and summaries as raw HTML
broken_control: highlightHtml returns raw text and v-html inserts it as DOM
impact: Stored XSS in home/search/category/tag/topic/column/user/following feeds; localStorage JWT can be read by injected script

title: Production-looking credentials and weak JWT secret are committed as defaults
broken_control: Secrets and signing key defaults are committed instead of fail-closed environment-only configuration
impact: Credential compromise if values are live; token forgery if default JWT secret is deployed

title: JWTs are accepted from URL query parameters across all API routes
broken_control: Global interceptor accepts token query parameter for protected /api/** instead of narrowly handling SSE or rejecting URL credentials
impact: Bearer tokens can leak via browser history, proxy/server logs, analytics, and referrers
